name: Rachel Dratch
blurb: Creator of the relentlessly bleak Debbie Downer.
bio: Rachel Dratch is an American comedian and actress who was a Saturday Night Live cast member from 1999 to 2006, best known for the buzzkill character Debbie Downer. She came up through Chicago's Second City and has worked widely in comedy since.

flags.note: Added 2026-06-17 discovery pass (expanded comedy-bit scope): minimum profile = bio + headshot + one verified clip; deepen via the audit game.
